steps.title: Identify point values for each round
steps.content: First round correct responses are worth 2 points each, so $f$ correct responses contribute $2f$ points. Second round correct responses are worth 5 points each, so $s$ correct responses contribute $5s$ points.

steps.title: Build the total points inequality
steps.content:
The total points scored is the sum: $2f + 5s$. The contestant needs to score at least 100 points, which means the total must be greater than or equal to 100. Therefore:
$$2f + 5s \geq 100$$
This matches choice B — B is correct.
